org.exist.dom
Class AbstractNodeSetBase

  org.exist.xquery.value.AbstractSequence
      org.exist.dom.AbstractNodeSet
          org.exist.dom.AbstractNodeSetBase
All Implemented Interfaces:

Direct Known Subclasses:

public abstract class AbstractNodeSetBase
extends AbstractNodeSet

Method Summary
 boolean hasIndex()
          Returns true if all nodes in this node set and their descendants are included in the fulltext index.
 boolean isCached()
          Returns true if the sequence is the result of a previous operation and has been cached.
 void setIsCached(boolean cached)
          Indicates that the sequence is the result of a previous operation and has not been recomputed.

isCached in class AbstractSequence

hasIndex

public boolean hasIndex()
Returns true if all nodes in this node set and their descendants are included in the fulltext index. This information is required to determine if comparison operators can use the fulltext index to speed up equality comparisons.

Returns:
See Also:
GeneralComparison, ValueComparison
